message:
Add video serving route, frame saving, and video playback in UI

Screencast frames are now saved as numbered JPEGs during runs for later
replay. The results API serves video files (webm/mp4) when available,
and RunDetail shows a video player that gracefully hides when no video
exists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
